preferred_components.reason: Product surfaces use a shared wrapper for analytics, sentiment defaults, and loading behavior.

approved_wrappers.name: AppButton
approved_wrappers.reason: Adds analytics and approved product defaults without changing the canonical Salt primitive underneath.

token_aliases.reason: Markets surfaces consume the local border alias so product theming stays centralized.

theme_defaults.reason: This repo applies one approved theme shell around canonical Salt theme defaults.

token_family_policies.reason: Container roles map through local aliases so app-level theming can vary without changing component code.

pattern_preferences.reason: The repo composes the canonical Salt navigation primitives into one approved shell wrapper.

banned_choices.name: UNSTABLE_SaltProviderNext
banned_choices.reason: The repo is standardized on SaltProvider only.

notes: Keep canonical Salt guidance and project conventions separate in final recommendations.
Do not present project wrappers as if they were part of the official Salt registry.
